Notes: Source from Quectel distributor — not on LCSC. NO integrated GNSS.
ESP32 + peripherals power — ultra-low quiescent for deep sleep. FIXED: C14289 was HT7533-1 (5V output) not HT7333-A (3.3V).
EG800Q-EU VBAT supply — replaces RT9080 LDO (thermal failure at 2S input). 90% efficient vs 59% LDO.
3.3V ↔ 1.8V: MODEM_TX (GPIO 17 → EG800Q RXD). Replaces TXB0104 per March 2026 update.
Q3 drain pull-up to 3.3V (MODEM_TX ESP32 side)
Q4 drain pull-up to 3.3V (MODEM_RX ESP32 side)
Q5 drain pull-up to 3.3V (MODEM_PWRKEY ESP32 side)
Q6 drain pull-up to 3.3V (MODEM_RST ESP32 side)
Q3 source pull-up to 1.8V VDD_EXT (MODEM_TX modem side)
Q4 source pull-up to 1.8V VDD_EXT (MODEM_RX modem side)
Q6 source pull-up to 1.8V VDD_EXT (MODEM_RST modem side)
Standalone GPS — NMEA 9600 baud. Source from u-blox/Mouser/DigiKey.
GPS power gate — GPIO 6 controls M10 VCC
Inverts GPIO 6 HIGH→LOW for P-FET gate drive
Battery divider top (ratio 3.128 — 7.2V max → 2.30V at ADC). C1 filter cap critical for ADC accuracy. FIXED: C25585 was 1kΩ 0603 not 1MΩ 0402.
Battery divider bottom (ratio 3.128 — bleed 4.9µA). Calibrate ADC_CAL_FACTOR per-board. FIXED: C25117 was 470Ω not 470kΩ.
Trap trigger pull-up (100k reduces sleep drain to 33µA vs 330µA with 10k)
GPS power gate pull-up (P-FET gate to 3V3)
M10 V_BCKP series resistor (optional hot start)

Q5 source pull-up to 1.8V VDD_EXT (MODEM_PWRKEY modem side). FIXED: was pull-DOWN which held PWRKEY permanently LOW — modem auto-starts and AT+QPOWD cannot turn it off (Quectel HW Design Guide §3.7.1). Must be pull-UP so PWRKEY idles HIGH.
U5 buck FB top — sets Vout = 0.6V × (1 + 160k/30k) = 3.80V
U5 buck FB bottom — sets Vout = 3.80V for EG800Q-EU VBAT
U5 buck power inductor — CENKER shielded 5040. Place close to AP63300 SW pin.
U5 buck output cap (close to SW/VOUT). 22µF min for buck loop stability.
U5 buck bootstrap cap (BST to SW pin)
IPEX/u.FL for coax — routes to EG800Q-EU RF_ANT
IPEX/u.FL for coax — routes to M10 RF_IN
12V solar input — LiFePO4 2S (7.2V) charge profile via FBVR resistor. DNP for Pack D. Source from LCSC/Mouser.
Optional — connects to ESP32 EN via 100nF
